body.description:
Claude Code moved to Max (Pro Max auth) — no REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in use anymore. Clean up all references: CLAUDE.md env-split section (says CC uses key), context-load Step 0 env check, lab/claudecode startup checks, any Igor .env docs that mention it.

**Affected files:** CLAUDE.md, .claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md, lab/claudecode/stale_slate_check.py (or wherever the check lives), .env docs
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — grep for REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; update docs/checks to note Max auth; remove startup warnings about missing key. OUT — OR routing for Igor (stays unchanged).
**Test plan:** no tests needed — grep verify all references cleaned up. Manual check: start a session, verify no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY warnings in context-load.
